## Checklist
- [ ] `npm test` and `npm run build` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated for logic changes (see `server/test/`)
- [ ] The change is focused — one concern per PR
- [ ] Hardware-affecting changes (drivers, motion, pen/servo) are described, and tested on a real plotter where possible

## Contributor License Agreement
By opening this PR you'll be asked to sign the [Plotterbench CLA](CLA.md) — the
CLA bot comments with instructions, and the `cla` check must be green before the
PR can be merged. You only sign once. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md).
